summary: TWO_COLUMN: physicist Hermite polynomials H_n(x) via 3-term recurrence H_{n+1}=2x H_n - 2n H_{n-1}. LEFT axes with YELLOW current H_n(x)·e^(-x²/2) curve via always_redraw + BLUE→TEAL history. ValueTracker n_tr steps 0..5. RIGHT shows numeric ∫H_n² e^(-x²) dx via np.trapezoid matching √π·2^n·n! analytic formula.
